data.title: Propanc Biopharma reports progress on R&D programs and PRP asset for Phase 1b study in half yearly 2025/26 results.
data.description: We are excited about the progress achieved in our research and development efforts, particularly with our main product PRP. We are currently gearing up for a groundbreaking Phase 1b clinical trial, which will be the first of its kind in the world.

data.title: SEGG Media appoints Daniel Bailey to board after acquiring majority of Veloce Media Group for revenue growth.
data.description: The Co-Founder and CEO of Veloce is set to join the SEGG Board as the company experiences a surge in revenue growth. Veloce is a sports and digital media platform that has seen a significant increase in its income.

data.title: Kraig Labs (OTCQB: KBLB) nears breakthrough in spider silk production, moving towards commercial scale.
data.description: Kraig Laboratories, trading under the ticker symbol KBLB on the OTCQB market, is moving into a crucial stage as it ramps up efforts to begin large-scale production of biodegradable spider silk.

data.title: Stardust Power Inc. secures $10M financing through equity agreement with B. Riley, will raise capital over 36 months.
data.description: In Greenwich, Connecticut on February 18, 2026, Stardust Power Inc. (NASDAQ: SDST), a US-based company specializing in battery-grade lithium carbonate, disclosed securing a common equity financing of up to $10.0 million. The funding, known as the "Equity Facility," involves a common stock purchase agreement with B. Riley Principal Capital II, LLC, allowing Stardust Power to access the capital as needed within a 36-month timeframe, following standard procedures.

data.title: Xtreme One Entertainment announces XFC's return to Iowa on April 25 for XFC 54: Ascension at Xtream Arena as part of its 2026 expansion.
data.description: The popular MMA event XFC will be making a comeback in Iowa on April 25 with XFC 54: Ascension taking place at the Xtream Arena. This event is significant as it is part of XFC's national expansion plan for 2026, aiming to showcase top MMA fighters and talent. Fans can expect an action-packed night of fights featuring some of the best fighters in the sport. Be sure to mark your calendars for April 25 to catch all the excitement live at Xtream Arena.

data.title: Amkor Technology will be presenting at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference in Tempe, Arizona.
data.description: Amkor Technology, based in Tempe, Arizona, is scheduled to participate in the upcoming Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference. During the event, the company will present key information to industry professionals and investors. This conference presents a valuable opportunity for Amkor Technology to showcase its advancements and strategies for growth. The event is anticipated to draw a large audience with participation from various sectors, highlighting innovations and trends in the technology, media, and telecom industries.

data.title: QT Imaging (Nasdaq: QTI) announces record revenue in Q4 2025 with highest number of scanners shipped.
data.description: QT Imaging Holdings, Inc., a medical device company traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol QTI, based in Novato, California, disclosed its preliminary unaudited financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and the entirety of 2025. The company focuses on revolutionizing breast health management with innovative, radiation-free imaging technology. In the fourth quarter of 2025, a significant milestone was achieved as the company reported record-high quarterly revenue fuelled by an unprecedented quantity of scanners shipped. The solid performance was attributed to robust execution across the board.

data.title: Hammurabi, a division of Xchange Benefits, introduces AI platform transforming medical stop loss underwriting.
data.description: In Armonk, New York, Hammurabi, a Division of Xchange Benefits, has introduced an innovative AI platform that is transforming medical stop loss underwriting. This groundbreaking technology is set to revolutionize the industry with its advanced capabilities. The platform promises to streamline operations and enhance accuracy in underwriting processes, significantly benefiting the medical stop loss sector. This development marks a significant milestone for the company and is expected to have a major impact on the market.

data.title: Ibex Medical Analytics appoints new CEO and expanding biopharma division, amid global growth.
data.description: Ibex Medical Analytics, a global leader in clinical-grade AI-powered pathology based in Boston and Tel Aviv, has reported ongoing commercial success and increased global acceptance. The company has announced a leadership change to drive its next growth phase. Yair Heller, previously the Chief Operating Officer, has been promoted to Chief Executive Officer. Meanwhile, co-founder Joseph Mossel will now focus on leading Ibex's growing biopharma division as of now. This transition aims to fuel the company's development further.
